downward-dog.description: Inverted V-shape with hands and feet on the ground, hips pressing up and back.
cues: Spread fingers wide, press through the whole hand
Rotate upper arms outward to broaden the shoulders
Press thighbones back, let the heels sink toward the floor
Keep a slight bend in the knees if hamstrings are tight

child-pose.description: Kneeling forward fold with arms extended or alongside the body.
cues: Knees together or wide apart depending on variation
Walk hands forward to lengthen the spine
Look forward and open the chest
Avoid dumping weight into the lower back
Hands rooted under shoulders, heels pressing to the wall behind you.

seated-wide-legged-forward-fold-relax.label: seated wide legged forward fold relaxed

cues: from table top walk your arms out long and keep your hips square to your knees.  legs at 90°
